Reversible instantly.' -m 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>')

Improved _JUDGE_PROMPT to ignore fixed kW/TR benchmark thresholds \(0.55/0.65/0.75/0.85\) — they'\\''re design constants, not data claims. Recorded as a SIGNAL \(no s2_grounded hard gate\): the small judge over-flags interpretive phrases, so per critique.py'\\''s '\\''second opinion, never a gate'\\'' it'\\''s observability, not pass/fail. A true S2 gate needs the telemetry summary threaded into the runner. Validated live: case passes \(S1\), s2_verdict captured.' -m 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>')

Validated: off -> [], configured -> LangchainCallbackHandler. Full span verification needs the obs Langfuse container up.' -m 'Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>')
